## Summary

- **79** Vue components
- **9** SCSS-only components (no Vue wrapper)
- **88** total components
- **15** Vue components with responsive breakpoints
- **1** SCSS-only components with responsive breakpoints
- **0** Vue components without Playground template

Of 51 SCSS directories in `@fkui/design`, 42 have corresponding Vue wrappers (shown in the Vue table above). The remaining 9 have no Vue wrapper and are listed in the SCSS-only table.
